name: dotjez
description: The dotjez skill set — cross-cutting how-to-work-with-an-agent skills.

plugins.name: dotjez
plugins.description: Cross-cutting agent skills: planning and stress-testing ideas, prompt-writing, don't-trust-memory verification (facts, tooling, and visuals), stranger-testing docs before they ship, delegation, role agents and self-refining loops, and the occasional step-back reflection.
